ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_ppp" REAL /* GDP (PPP) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the happiness score */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country in global happiness */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Overall happiness score */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "life_expectancy_score" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "corruption_perception" REAL /* Perception of corruption score */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual */,
  " hedonic_eudaimonia" REAL /* Hedonic eudaimonia score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic indicators */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Income inequality (Gini coefficient) */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance */,
  "current_account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the social indicators */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Education index */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "health_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Health spending per capita */,
  "social_support_index" REAL /* Social support index */,
  "gender_equality_index" REAL /* Gender equality index */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health indicators */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Vaccination coverage */,
  "healthcare_quality_index" REAL /* Healthcare quality index */,
  "maternal_mortality_ratio" REAL /* Maternal mortality ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental indicators */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions per capita */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "biodiversity_index" REAL /* Biodiversity index */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Forest coverage */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Renewable energy share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the political indicators */,
  "democracy_index" REAL /* Democracy index */,
  "government_effectiveness" REAL /* Government effectiveness */,
  "political_stability" REAL /* Political stability */,
  "corruption_index" REAL /* Corruption index */,
  "freedom_of_press" REAL /* Freedom of press */,
  "electoral_process" REAL /* Electoral process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the security indicators */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 people */,
  "homicide_rate" REAL /* Homicide rate per 100,000 people */,
  "terrorism_index" REAL /* Terrorism index */,
  "military_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Military spending per capita */,
  "peacekeeping_contribution" REAL /* Peacekeeping contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the education data */,
  "enrollment_rate_primary" REAL /* Enrollment rate in primary education */,
  "enrollment_rate_secondary" REAL /* Enrollment rate in secondary education */,
  "enrollment_rate_tertiary" REAL /* Enrollment rate in tertiary education */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Teacher-student ratio */,
  "public_expenditure_on_education" REAL /* Public expenditure on education as a percentage of GDP */,
  "literacy_rate_adults" REAL /* Literacy rate among adults */,
  "student_achievement_index" REAL /* Student achievement index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the healthcare data */,
  "hospital_beds_per_1000" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1,000 people */,
  "physicians_per_1000" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1,000 people */,
  "nurses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of nurses per 1,000 people */,
  "public_expenditure_on_healthcare" REAL /* Public expenditure on healthcare as a percentage of GDP */,
  "private_expenditure_on_healthcare" REAL /* Private expenditure on healthcare as a percentage of GDP */,
  "healthcare_accessibility_index" REAL /* Healthcare accessibility index */,
  "healthcare_outcome_index" REAL /* Healthcare outcome index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental data */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in total energy consumption */,
  "greenhouse_gas_emissions" REAL /* Greenhouse gas emissions in million metric tons of CO2 equivalent */,
  "deforestation_rate" REAL /* Deforestation rate */,
  "water_consumption_per_capita" REAL /* Water consumption per capita in cubic meters */,
  "waste_management_index" REAL /* Waste management index */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "air_pollution_index" REAL /* Air pollution index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the political data */,
  "political_parties" INTEGER /* Number of political parties */,
  "voting_population" INTEGER /* Voting population */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout as a percentage of the voting population */,
  "legislative_efficiency" REAL /* Legislative efficiency */,
  "civil_society_organization_density" REAL /* Density of civil society organizations */,
  "judicial_independence" REAL /* Judicial independence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the security data */,
  "police_force_per_1000" REAL /* Number of police force per 1,000 people */,
  "prison_population_rate" REAL /* Prison population rate per 100,000 people */,
  "cybersecurity_index" REAL /* Cybersecurity index */,
  "natural_disaster_risk_index" REAL /* Natural disaster risk index */,
  "terrorism_index" REAL /* Terrorism index */,
  "nuclear_security_index" REAL /* Nuclear security index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, government agency) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., dataset, report, visualization) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., researcher, analyst, coordinator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "contribution" REAL /* Contribution of the user to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., happiness, economic, social) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the dataset was added to the project */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, NGO, academic) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing values, outliers, errors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
